title: HACS Manifest
description: Manifest file for HACS (Home Assistant Community Store) repositories.

name.description: The display name that will be used in the HACS UI.

content_in_root.description: Indicates whether the content is in the root of the repository.

zip_release.description: Indicates whether the content is in a zipped archive when releases are published on GitHub.

filename.description: Name of the file HACS should look for. Applies to single-item types like themes.

hide_default_branch.description: Tells HACS to not offer downloading the default branch.

country.description: Two-character country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

homeassistant.description: The minimum required Home Assistant version (e.g., '2024.1.0').

render_readme.description: Tells HACS to render the README.md file instead of info.md in the UI.

persistent_directory.description: A relative path within the integration directory that will be kept safe during upgrades.

domains.description: A list of domains that the integration provides.

iot_class.description: The IoT class of the integration.
